questions.question: Q201. The scenery of the Himalayas _______ very enchanting.
questions.explanation: "Scenery" is an uncountable noun and always takes a singular verb. "Scenery" uncountable noun है, इसलिए इसके साथ हमेशा singular verb "is" आता है।

questions.question: Q202. I have many _______ to do before the weekend.
questions.explanation: "Work" is uncountable; for plural sense, use "pieces of work". "Work" uncountable है, बहुत काम बताने के लिए "pieces of work" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q203. The _______ of the movie were not very clear.
questions.explanation: Some nouns are always used in the plural form like "visuals". कुछ nouns हमेशा plural रूप में उपयोग होते हैं जैसे कि "visuals"।

questions.question: Q204. She gave me two _______ of advice regarding my career.
questions.explanation: "Advice" is uncountable; to count it, we use "pieces of". "Advice" uncountable है, इसे गिनने योग्य बनाने के लिए "pieces of" लगाते हैं।

questions.question: Q205. All the _______ were transported to the new house.
questions.explanation: "Furniture" is an uncountable noun and does not take 's'. "Furniture" uncountable noun है, इसका plural 'furnitures' नहीं होता।

questions.question: Q206. The police _______ investigating the robbery case.
questions.explanation: The noun "Police" is always treated as a plural collective noun. "Police" को हमेशा plural collective noun माना जाता है, इसलिए "are" लगेगा।

questions.question: Q207. Economics _______ a subject that requires a lot of logic.
questions.explanation: Names of subjects ending in 's' like Economics take a singular verb. 's' पर खत्म होने वाले विषयों के नाम (Economics) singular verb लेते हैं।

questions.question: Q208. Her hair _______ turned grey at a very young age.
questions.explanation: "Hair" is considered uncountable and takes a singular verb. "Hair" को uncountable माना जाता है और इसके साथ singular verb "has" आता है।

questions.question: Q209. The cattle _______ grazing in the open field.
questions.explanation: "Cattle" is a plural noun and always takes a plural verb. "Cattle" plural noun है और इसके साथ हमेशा plural verb "are" लगता है।

questions.question: Q210. Mathematics _______ difficult for those who don't practice.
questions.explanation: Mathematics is a singular noun representing a single subject. Mathematics एक singular noun है, इसलिए इसके साथ "is" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q211. I visited his house and found that his _______ were very old.
questions.explanation: Since "found" implies seeing the items, "pieces of furniture" is the best plural form. चूँकि यहाँ कई सामानों की बात है, "pieces of furniture" सही plural रूप है।

questions.question: Q212. I have a _______ rupee note in my wallet.
questions.explanation: When a hyphenated word acts as an adjective, it stays singular. जब hyphenated शब्द adjective का काम करे, तो वह singular (hundred-rupee) रहता है।

questions.question: Q213. He gave me two _______ notes.
questions.explanation: Compound adjectives like "five-hundred-rupee" do not take 's'. "Five-hundred-rupee" जैसे compound adjectives में 's' नहीं लगाया जाता।

questions.question: Q214. It was a _______ journey for all of us.
questions.explanation: "Three-hour" acts as an adjective for the noun "journey". "Three-hour" यहाँ noun 'journey' के लिए adjective का काम कर रहा है।

questions.question: Q215. She is a _______ girl.
questions.explanation: Hyphenated age acting as an adjective before a noun stays singular. Noun से पहले adjective के रूप में आने वाली उम्र singular रहती है।

questions.question: Q216. My cousin is _______ than me.
questions.explanation: "Elder" is specifically used for members of the same family. "Elder" का प्रयोग विशेष रूप से परिवार के सदस्यों के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q217. This car is _______ than the one I had before.
questions.explanation: "Older" is used for things and persons not related by blood. "Older" का प्रयोग वस्तुओं और गैर-रिश्तेदारों के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q218. Who is the _______ of the three brothers?
questions.explanation: For more than two family members, use the superlative "eldest". परिवार के दो से अधिक सदस्यों में सबसे बड़े के लिए "eldest" आता है।

questions.question: Q219. This is the _______ temple in our village.
questions.explanation: For buildings or objects, the superlative degree is "oldest". इमारतों या वस्तुओं के लिए superlative degree "oldest" होती है।

questions.question: Q220. My _______ brother is a pilot.
questions.explanation: Use "elder" before a noun to denote family relationship. परिवार के संबंध बताने के लिए noun से पहले "elder" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q221. Give the beggar _______ coins you have.
questions.explanation: "The few" means 'all of the small number available'. "The few" का अर्थ है 'जो थोड़े-बहुत सिक्के तुम्हारे पास हैं, वे सब'।

questions.question: Q222. There is _______ milk left in the bottle; it's almost empty.
questions.explanation: "Little" indicates a negligible amount (almost none). "Little" का अर्थ है 'न के बराबर', जो खाली बोतल के संदर्भ में सही है।

questions.question: Q223. I need _______ minutes to finish this task.
questions.explanation: "A few" is used for a small but positive number of minutes. "A few" का प्रयोग थोड़े समय (positive sense) के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q224. _______ knowledge is a dangerous thing.
questions.explanation: "A little" means a small amount, often used in this proverb. "A little knowledge" एक कहावत है जिसका अर्थ है 'अधूरा ज्ञान'।

questions.question: Q225. I spent _______ money I had on books.
questions.explanation: "The little" refers to the entire small amount that was present. "The little" उस पूरी थोड़ी राशि को दर्शाता है जो मौजूद थी।

questions.question: Q226. He can _______ speak English after living in London for a week.
questions.explanation: "Hardly" means 'almost not' or 'scarcely'. "Hardly" का अर्थ है 'मुश्किल से' या 'शायद ही'।

questions.question: Q227. You should try _______ to win the competition.
questions.explanation: "Hard" as an adverb means with energy and effort. "Hard" यहाँ मेहनत और प्रयास के लिए adverb के रूप में उपयोग हुआ है।

questions.question: Q228. There is _______ any water in the well.
questions.explanation: "Hardly any" is a common phrase meaning almost none. "Hardly any" का अर्थ है 'शायद ही कुछ' या 'न के बराबर'।

questions.question: Q229. It _______ ever rains in the desert.
questions.explanation: Both are correct, but "hardly ever" emphasizes the rarity of time. "Hardly ever" समय की दुर्लभता (rarely) पर जोर देता है।

questions.question: Q230. The ground was so _______ that we couldn't dig.
questions.explanation: Here "hard" is an adjective describing the surface. यहाँ "hard" जमीन की सतह की कठोरता बताने वाला adjective है।

questions.question: Q231. This box is _______ heavy for me to lift alone.
questions.explanation: "Too" indicates an excess that makes the action impossible. "Too" भारीपन की उस अधिकता को बताता है जिससे उठाना असंभव है।

questions.question: Q232. You are _______ kind to help me like this.
questions.explanation: "Very" is used for positive qualities without negative consequences. "Very" का प्रयोग सकारात्मक गुणों के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q233. The water is _______ cold to swim in.
questions.explanation: "Too cold to swim" implies it is excessively cold. "Too cold to swim" का मतलब है कि पानी तैरने के लिए बहुत ज्यादा ठंडा है।

questions.question: Q234. She is _______ intelligent to be easily fooled.
questions.explanation: "Too intelligent to be fooled" means her intelligence prevents her from being fooled. उसकी बुद्धि उसे मूर्ख बनने से रोकती है (too...to structure)।

questions.question: Q235. He is old _______ to take his own decisions.
questions.explanation: "Enough" follows the adjective "old" and indicates sufficiency. "Enough" हमेशा adjective के बाद आता है और पर्याप्तता दर्शाता है।

questions.question: Q236. There is _______ food for everyone at the party.
questions.explanation: "Enough" comes before the noun "food". Noun से पहले "enough" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q237. She didn't work hard _______ to pass the exam.
questions.explanation: "Enough" is placed after the adverb "hard". Adverb 'hard' के बाद "enough" का प्रयोग व्याकरणिक रूप से सही है।

questions.question: Q238. I have had _______ of your excuses.
questions.explanation: "Enough" can be used as a pronoun meaning a sufficient/excessive amount. "Enough" का प्रयोग यहाँ 'बहुत हो गया' के अर्थ में हुआ है।

questions.question: Q239. Is the room big _______ for the meeting?
questions.explanation: Adjective + enough is the standard order. Adjective के बाद "enough" लगाना मानक नियम है।

questions.question: Q240. The tea is _______ hot for me.
questions.explanation: "Too hot for me" suggests it's more than what I can handle/like. "Too hot" का अर्थ है कि गर्मी मेरी सहनशक्ति से अधिक है।

questions.question: Q241. I _______ go to the gym on weekends.
questions.explanation: Use the adverb "usually" to describe the frequency of a verb. Verb की आवृत्ति (frequency) बताने के लिए adverb "usually" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q242. This is my _______ route to the office.
questions.explanation: "Usual" is an adjective describing the noun "route". "Usual" यहाँ noun 'route' की विशेषता बताने वाला adjective है।

questions.question: Q243. As _______, he was late for the meeting.
questions.explanation: "As usual" is a fixed idiomatic expression. "As usual" (हमेशा की तरह) एक निश्चित मुहावरा है।

questions.question: Q244. She _______ arrives before anyone else.
questions.explanation: Adverbs of frequency like "usually" come before the main verb. आवृत्ति बताने वाले adverbs main verb से पहले आते हैं।

questions.question: Q245. I don't like _______ movies.
questions.explanation: "These" must be followed by a plural noun "kinds". "These" के साथ हमेशा plural noun "kinds" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q246. I prefer _______ dress to that one.
questions.explanation: "This" is used for a singular noun nearby. पास की एक वस्तु (singular) के लिए "this" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q247. _______ books belong to the library.
questions.explanation: For plural nouns, use "these" (nearby) or "those" (far). Plural nouns के लिए "these" या "those" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q248. Look at _______ birds flying in the distance.
questions.explanation: Use "those" for plural objects that are far away. दूर की plural वस्तुओं के लिए "those" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q249. _______ boy is very mischievous.
questions.explanation: "That" is used for a singular noun at a distance. दूर की एक वस्तु (singular) के लिए "that" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q250. I have never seen _______ a large diamond.
questions.explanation: Use "such" before "a/an + adjective + noun". "A/an + adjective + noun" से पहले "such" का प्रयोग होता है।
